name: Last Man on Earth | MILF Mania!
description:
A sudden blinding flash brightens the sky worldwide and within a moment all the men on earth disappear from thin air... all except for YOU, leaving you in a world entirely populated with women and making you a valuable target for mature women who want to have you before they're incapable of having kids...

{{IMG Source: @__DemonDog__ on twt for all of them}}

I made this as a tribute to all of you who have allowed me to get to 400 followers, thank you all so much and I'll make sure to give y'all all the hags you desire!

(Includes 8 possible scripted encounters!)
creator: runtice
